name: research-dossier-mock-roundtable
stop_condition: Stop after one mock evidence-matrix cycle and final synthesis.

turns.name: evidence-matrix
turns.instruction: Produce a mock evidence matrix with explicit source and confidence fields.

turns.name: source-audit
turns.instruction: Audit the mock evidence matrix for unsupported claims and missing unknowns.

turns.name: enterprise-critique
turns.instruction: Critique the mock dossier as an enterprise decision artifact.

final.name: final-dossier
final.instruction: Synthesize the mock dossier into a final document.
